title: hieracium calcareum subsp. holleri
intro: Hieracium calcareum subsp. holleri, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to certain regions. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. In terms of herbal preparations, Hieracium calcareum subsp. holleri can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
